app_info.subtitle: Church content tools
app_info.description: Ide.On helps church teams use ChatGPT to look up their authenticated church workspace data, including sermons, generated content, volunteers, volunteer schedules, and published church site records. The app supports read-only planning and review workflows so users can reference ministry content and operations data while preparing communications and next steps.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves the authenticated user's identity and profile details without creating or updating records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or external third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists sermons that belong to the authenticated user and does not modify sermon records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, send, or change any public or third-party system state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only fetches one sermon owned by the authenticated user and returns its transcript and summary.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, send, or change any public or third-party system state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only searches and lists content-library records for the authenticated user without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change any public or external system state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves a selected content-library item owned by the authenticated user.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change any public or external system state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists volunteer records for the authenticated user without creating or updating volunteers.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not contact volunteers or change any public or third-party system state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists volunteer schedule assignments for the authenticated user and optional filters.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not notify volunteers, publish schedules, or change external system state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists church site records owned by the authenticated user and derives URLs for already published sites.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, unpublish, or alter any church site or public web state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Confirm the signed-in user's Ide.On profile before helping with workspace-specific planning.
test_cases.user_prompt: Quem sou eu no Ide.On e qual igreja está associada ao meu perfil?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the authenticated user's profile details and explains that the data comes from their Ide.On account.

test_cases.description: List recent sermons so the user can choose one to repurpose into content.
test_cases.user_prompt: Liste minhas últimas 10 pregações disponíveis no Ide.On para eu escolher uma para transformar em posts.
test_cases.expected_output: Shows recent sermon records with identifiers, status, summaries, and creation dates when available.

test_cases.description: Fetch a specific sermon selected by the user for review and content planning.
test_cases.user_prompt: Abra a pregação 11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111 e resuma os principais pontos para redes sociais.
test_cases.expected_output: Retrieves the requested sermon if it belongs to the user and uses its transcript and summary to answer.

test_cases.description: Find draft content-library items by status and topic before a publishing review.
test_cases.user_prompt: Encontre na minha biblioteca conteúdos em rascunho sobre devocional para eu revisar hoje.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching content-library items with titles, content types, pillars, statuses, favorites, and creation dates.

test_cases.description: Review ministry operations data by listing volunteer schedules and church sites.
test_cases.user_prompt: Mostre minhas escalas de voluntários desta semana e depois liste os sites de igreja publicados.
test_cases.expected_output: Lists schedule assignments for the requested date range and church site records, including URLs only for already published sites.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for requests to create or publish public social media posts.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Publique agora este post no Instagram da minha igreja.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the MCP tools only read Ide.On data and cannot publish to social networks.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated general Bible study requests that do not need Ide.On workspace data.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Explique João 3:16 sem usar dados da minha conta.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the user is asking for general knowledge rather than Ide.On account data.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for destructive account or database administration requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Apague todos os voluntários antigos do banco de dados.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it does not provide destructive or administrative write actions.
